headline: ICE Agent CAPS рҹҡ”рҹ’Ҙ Minneapolis Momma рҹҳ©рҹҚ‘ in SUV Standoff! Trump BACKS рҹ’ӘрҹҮәрҹҮё
text:
Minneapolis MAMA Renee Nicole Good рҹ‘©вҖҚрҹ‘§рҹ’” 37yo QUEEN рҹҘә got FATALLY SMOKED рҹ”«рҹ’Ҙ by ICE STUD рҹ§‘вҖҚвңҲпёҸрҹҡ” after allegedly trying to YEET рҹҡ—рҹ’Ё her MAROON BEAST рҹҚ‘рҹҡҷ over fed bros in the street! Videos DROPPING рҹ“№рҹ”Ҙ show ICE SIMPS рҹӨЎ pulling up to her BLOCKED BLOCK рҹӣ‘рҹҸҳпёҸ, yanking DOOR рҹҚҶрҹҡӘ like 'GET OUT BBY рҹ‘Ӣ!' She PEELS OUT рҹҸҺпёҸрҹ’Ё, agent STEPS UP в¬ҶпёҸрҹҳӨ yells 'STOP!' then BLASTS рҹ”«рҹ’Ұ POINT BLANK through WINDSHIELD рҹӣЎпёҸрҹҳұ вҖ“ BOOM рҹ’Ҙ two shots, SUV SPINS OUT рҹӨӘрҹ’Ҙ crashes into PARKED RIDE рҹҡ—рҹӣ‘! Trump рҹҚҠрҹ‘‘ on Truth Social TRUTH-BOMBS рҹ’Јрҹ“ұ: 'ICE HERO рҹҰёвҖҚвҷӮпёҸ VISCIOUSLY RUN OVER рҹҳ©рҹҸҘ by RADICAL LEFT CRAZE рҹӨ¬ вҖ“ dude SURVIVED рҹ’Ә recovering like a CHAMP!' Blames DEM CLOWNS рҹӨЎрҹ”ҙ for ASSAULTING рҹҘҠ LAW DOGS рҹҗ¶рҹҡ” DAILY! DHS BAE Kristi Noem рҹ’…рҹҮәрҹҮё spills: Sis was STALKING рҹ‘Җрҹҡ« officers ALL DAY, WEAPONIZED рҹҡ—вҡ”пёҸ her whip in DOMESTIC TERROR MODE рҹ§ЁрҹҳҲ вҖ“ agent FIRED DEFENSIVE ROUNDS рҹӣЎпёҸрҹ”«, got BUMPED but DISCHARGED рҹҸҘвң… like a boss (same dude HIT by CAR in June рҹҳӮрҹҡҷ)!

But LOCAL LEFTIES рҹҳӨрҹ”ҙ CRYING FOUL! Dem Mayor Jacob Frey рҹӨЎрҹҡ« F-BOMBS рҹ’Ҙ 'GTFO ICE GOONS рҹҘҫрҹҡ« you're RECKLESS AF!' City Council simps: 'She was just CARING FOR NEIGHBORS рҹ«ӮрҹҸҳпёҸ!' Chief O'Hara рҹ“Ј: 'Blocked ROADWAY рҹҡ§, drove off when approached рҹҳҸ.' Eyewitness Emily Heller рҹ‘Җрҹ“ә to CNN: 'Agent TRIED DOOR рҹ”‘, she REVERSED рҹӣһрҹ”ҷ, he JUMPED IN FRONT рҹҡ”в¬ҮпёҸ, BANG рҹ’Ҙ face-shot through glass рҹҳұ!' Gov Tim Walz рҹ§”рҹҳЎ claps back: 'Don't buy FED PROPAGANDA рҹӨҘрҹ“° вҖ“ FULL PROBE INCOMING вҡ–пёҸрҹ”Қ for JUSTICE!'

Kamala рҹ‘өрҹҳӮ & Hakeem Jeffries рҹ“ў DEM DADDIES call Trump VER 'GASLIGHTING' рҹҳөвҖҚрҹ’«рҹӣўпёҸ! PROTESTS ERUPTING рҹ”ҘрҹӘ§ in Miniapple вҖ“ HUNDREDS RAGING рҹҳЎвңҠ just 1 MILE from GEORGE FLOYD SPOT рҹ–ӨвңҠрҹҸҝ 2020 RIOTS VIBES! Schools SHUT DOWN рҹҸ«рҹҡ« rest of week cuz SAFETY SCARES рҹҳ° after ICE BAGS рҹ‘®вҖҚвҷӮпёҸрҹ’ј kids outside HIGH SCHOOL! Frey RANTS: 'ICE ain't SAFER вҖ“ RIPPING FAMILIES рҹ‘ЁвҖҚрҹ‘©вҖҚрҹ‘§вҖҚрҹ‘Ұрҹ’”, SOWING CHAOS рҹҢӘпёҸ!' 2000+ FED GOONS рҹӣЎпёҸрҹҡЁ DROPPED in MN for WELFARE FRAUD BUST рҹ’°рҹҡ« on SOMALI SQUAD рҹ•ҢрҹҮёрҹҮҙ вҖ“ Trump calls 'em GARBAGE рҹ—‘пёҸрҹҳӨ 'Their country STINKS рҹ’ЁрҹӨ® вҖ“ NO MORE!' Withheld CHILDCARE CASH рҹ’ёрҹ‘¶ from state!

ICE CRACKDOWN BRRRR рҹҡ”рҹ”Ҙ nationwide вҖ“ THOUSANDS BAGGED рҹӣ’рҹ‘®вҖҚвҷӮпёҸ in NOLA, Miami рҹҸ–пёҸ, Seattle вҳ•, NYC рҹҚҺ for CRIME + ILLEGAL INVADERS рҹҢҺрҹҡ«! FBI PROBING рҹ•өпёҸвҖҚвҷӮпёҸрҹ”Қ but OPS CONTINUE рҹҳҲрҹ’Ә вҖ“ Trump 2.0 DEPORTATION ORGY рҹ’ҰвңҲпёҸ SLAYING borders like a BOSS! Lefties MELTING рҹҳ©рҹ”Ҙ, righties CHEERING рҹҘірҹҮәрҹҮё вҖ“ WHO YA GOT? рҹҺӨрҹҚҝ
